description: AirJoule Technologies Corporation operates as an atmospheric renewable energy and water harvesting technology company. It provides energy and dehumidification, water harvesting systems, water recapture systems, evaporative heat pump systems, water heating systems, low relative humidity drying systems, pre- and mid-cool integration coils, evaporative cooling, advanced vacuum pump systems, isothermal condenser design, gate and seal systems, and atmospheric water generation through its AirJoule technology.
